mapper.select: select id, module_code, action_code, target_id, result_status from operation_logs order by id desc
select id, node_id, host, status from gateway_nodes order by id desc
mapper.insert: insert into backup_jobs(job_code, status, snapshot_ref) values(#{jobCode}, #{status}, #{snapshotRef})
mapper.update: update backup_jobs set status = #{status} where job_code = #{jobCode}
